home.title: Reservations · Cobra & Informace
home.description: Group reservations for 10–35 people at Bar Cobra and Tap Room Informace. Custom catering, we'll get back to you within 48 hours.

inquiry.title: Bar Cobra private hire, enquiry · Cobra & Informace
inquiry.description: Enquiry form for private events from 36 people. We'll work out the details individually.

layout.footerSuffix: and we'll talk about a private hire at Bar Cobra.

home.title: Group reservation
home.descriptionFill: Fill in the basics, build your catering, and we'll get back to you within 48 hours. Looking for a table for 1–10 people?

thankYou.reservationBody: We have received your reservation. We'll send you a confirmation or a follow-up question by email soon. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
thankYou.inquiryBody: Larger events are handled individually, so we'll call or write to you within a few days, we'll agree on a date, venue and catering.
thankYou.spam: In the meantime, keep an eye on your inbox (including your spam folder).

inquiryPage.title: Bar Cobra private hire, enquiry
inquiryPage.description: Bar Cobra is ideal for private events for <capacity>50–100 people</capacity>. Private hire is offered as a guaranteed minimum spend. We are happy to discuss everything with you by email, phone or in person, whichever you prefer.
inquiryPage.smallerText: Looking for a smaller reservation instead?

date.label: Date
date.hint: The earliest possible date is tomorrow. Catering requires at least 3 days' notice.

time.label: Start time
time.hintCapacity: For capacity reasons we do not accept reservations after 20:30.

underflow.title: For {min} or fewer people we have a simpler option.
underflow.body: This form is designed for larger groups, for a smaller table it's quicker to book via rezervujstul.cz. Feel free to continue here though, we'll work it out.

overflow.title: For groups over 35 we handle things individually.
overflow.body: For private hire we have a separate enquiry form, we'll sort out the details by phone or in person.

step1.venueLegend: Where would you like to go?
step1.venueHint: Cobra and Informace are two venues <bold>10 metres apart</bold>, we're happy to bring dinner from Cobra into the tap room.

cobra.bullet1: Extensive cocktail menu including signature drinks
cobra.bullet3: Standard selection of beers, wines and spirits
cobra.fitsYou: Best suited for reservations up to 20 people.

informace.tagline: A smaller, informal venue connected to Cobra.
informace.bullet1: Basic selection of wines, cocktails and spirits
informace.bullet3: Dinner can be ordered from Cobra, the kitchen is shared
informace.fitsYou: A great fit if you want a beer-focused event, a bigger group and an informal atmosphere.

unsure.tagline: We'll find the right fit for your reservation together.

step1.largeCobraBody: For groups over 30 at Cobra we're really talking about a private hire. If the cocktail menu isn't your top priority, <bold>Informace</bold> tends to work better for a larger crowd, you can still order food from Cobra there. The choice is of course yours.

step3.title: Would you like to order catering at the same time?
step3.body: Add items using the −/+ buttons. The price updates live below. Catering is optional, you can skip it and just confirm the reservation.
step3.bodyAlt: Or we can work it out together by email or phone. If you have a dish in mind that you don't see here, we'll do our best to make it happen.
step3.snapshotWarning: The catering menu is currently loaded from a bundled snapshot (live data is not available). Items and prices may be slightly out of date, we'll confirm the final price in our reply.
step3.leadWarningTitle: Catering needs to be ordered at least 3 days in advance
step3.leadWarningBody: Without catering we can accept a reservation as late as tomorrow. If this date still works for you, we can discuss catering individually, add a note in the next step, or skip catering and we'll sort out the details in our reply.

step4.name: Full name
step4.notePlaceholder: Feel free to leave us a few words. For example, that you'd like to bring balloons and a cake.
step4.honeypot: If you see this field, leave it empty
step4.gdpr: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of handling this reservation.

reservationForm.stepErrorTitle: We still need a bit more information…
reservationForm.stepErrorRed: Please check the fields highlighted in red above and complete them.
reservationForm.serverError: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again in a moment, or email us at rezervace@barcobra.cz.

catering.empty: The catering menu is temporarily unavailable, please write your requirements in the note field (step 3) and we'll get back to you with options.

inquiryForm.name: Full name
inquiryForm.descriptionPlaceholder: What are you expecting from the event? Catering, venue, music, timing, any specifics, the more you write, the more precisely we can respond.
inquiryForm.honeypot: If you see this field, leave it empty
inquiryForm.gdpr: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of handling this enquiry.
inquiryForm.serverError: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again in a moment, or email us at rezervace@barcobra.cz.

categories.slane_hlavni: Sharing platters not on our regular menu
categories.misy: Abundance platters in any quantity to match your budget
categories.mala_jidla: Small dishes from our all-day menu

validation.phoneMin: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.phoneRegex: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +420 777 123 456)
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.partySizeMin: Please enter the number of guests
validation.name: Please enter your first and last name
validation.gdprReservation: Consent is required to submit the reservation
validation.gdprInquiry: Consent is required to submit the enquiry
validation.inquiryPartySizeMin: For groups up to 35 people, please use the main form
validation.inquiryPartySizeMax: For an event this size, please contact us directly by phone
validation.inquiryEventType: Please enter the type of event
validation.inquiryDescription: Please write a few sentences about your vision (at least 10 characters)

actions.turnstile: We could not verify that you are not a robot. Please reload the page and try again.
actions.sendError: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again in a moment, or email us at rezervace@barcobra.cz.
actions.reservationSubjectCustomer: Thank you for your reservation · Cobra & Informace
actions.inquirySubjectCustomer: Thank you for your enquiry · Cobra & Informace

emailReservationCustomer.preview: Thank you for your reservation, we'll be in touch within 48 hours · Cobra & Informace
emailReservationCustomer.heading: Thank you for your reservation, {name}!
emailReservationCustomer.body: We have received your request. We'll get back to you within {strong} with a confirmation (or a follow-up question) to your email {email}. If you'd like to make any changes in the meantime, simply reply to this email or give us a call.
emailReservationCustomer.footerCopy: This email is an automatic copy. You can reply directly to it, it goes straight to our inbox.

emailReservationOperator.heading: New reservation
emailReservationOperator.footer: The guest expects a reply within 48 hours (the auto-reply confirms this). Reply from this inbox or forward to your own email.

emailInquiryCustomer.preview: Thank you for your enquiry, we'll get back to you
emailInquiryCustomer.heading: Thanks for your enquiry, {name}!
emailInquiryCustomer.body1: We've received your idea for an event for {strong}. Larger events are handled individually, so we'll call or write to you within a few days, we'll agree on a date, venue and catering.
emailInquiryCustomer.body2: If you have any additions or questions in the meantime, just reply to this email.

cateringItems.slane-salat-krevety: Prawn, potato & sun-dried tomato salad with our focaccia
cateringItems.kan-prazska: Prague ham, creamed horseradish, cornichon, sourdough bread
cateringItems.kan-vajicka: Egg spread with truffle mayo, our focaccia, chives
cateringItems.kan-pomazanky: Canapés with baba ganoush / hummus / muhammara
cateringItems.kan-zavitek-tofu: Summer roll with tofu, vegetables and omelette
cateringItems.kan-focaccia-halloumi-granat: Our focaccia with muhammara spread, halloumi & pomegranate
cateringItems.kan-focaccia-muhammara: Canapés with our focaccia, muhammara and grilled halloumi
cateringItems.mis-uzeniny: Charcuterie board, pickled vegetables & wholegrain mustard
